interface.name: ${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpartition
interface.channel-partition: ${olt\-port\-name}-cgroup <#if scg\-index?has_content> ${scg\-index} <#else> 1 </#if> true false <#if authentication\-method?has_content> ${authentication\-method} <#else> serial-number </#if> <#if closest\-onu\-distance?has_content> ${closest\-onu\-distance} </#if> <#if maximum\-differential\-xpon\-distance?has_content> ${maximum\-differential\-xpon\-distance} </#if> <#if early\-fetch\-onu\-loid\-info?has_content> ${early\-fetch\-onu\-loid\-info} </#if> <#if loid\-alternate\-fetch\-fall\-back?has_content> ${loid\-alternate\-fetch\-fall\-back} </#if>

interfaces.interface:
${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpair bbf-xponift:channel-pair <#if ber\-tca\-profile?has_content> ${ber\-tca\-profile} </#if>
${olt\-port\-name}-cgroup ${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpartition xgspon-wave bbf-xpon-types:xgs <#if authentication\-fail\-control?has_content> ${authentication\-fail\-control} </#if> <#if specific\-polling\-period?has_content> <#if specific\-polling\-period == 0> polling-disabled <#else> ${specific\-polling\-period} </#if> </#if> <#if burst\-overhead?has_content> ${burst\-overhead} </#if> <#if us\-omci\-granting?has_content> ${us\-omci\-granting} </#if>
